name: Steak & Ale Marinade #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together well the following ingredients for a recipe used in 1978 for Hawaiian Chicken, Club Steak, and Kabobs: 1 cup Soy Sauce, 1 cup Sherry Cooking Wine, 1/2 cup Red Wine Vinegar, 3/4 cup Sugar, and 1 teaspoon Garlic Powder.
2. For 12 chicken breasts, mix the remaining ingredients: 3 quarts Unsweetened Pineapple Juice.
3. Allow meat to marinate a minimum of 24 hours and a maximum of 48. If holding the meat longer than 48 hours, pour off the marinade.
